input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.7.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.7.5
            TITLE: a separate cost addendum may be submitted for every competition a vehicle attends.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.7.5: A separate Cost Addendum may be submitted for every competition a vehicle attends.
S.3.7.5 A separate Cost Addendum may be submitted for every competition a vehicle attends.

final_answer: A separate Cost Addendum may be submitted for every competition a vehicle attends.
